# Data Entry Schema

Use this schema for controlled studies and adapt it for platform tests.

```csv
participant_id,trial_id,video_id,condition_code,viewing_mode,video_type,visual_load,script_id,overlay_version,gist_recall,action_recall,contrast_recall,exact_recall,visual_recall,perceived_effort,clarity,obstruction,preference,completion,watch_time_seconds,rewatch,save,share,confusion_comment,notes
```

## Coding notes

- Recall scores can be binary, rubric-coded 0–2, or percentage.
- Keep scoring rubrics blind to condition where possible.
- Visual load should be pre-coded before outcome analysis.
- Distinguish comprehension failures from production/render failures.
- Record all exclusions with reason.
